headline: Agent tooling leads the month as marketplaces, automated review, and development kits all surge together.
body: The strongest rotation is in agent infrastructure: agent marketplace, automated review, and the Agent Development Kit all post peak momentum, alongside multilingual speech among techniques. Tooling items reinforce this, including a five-component agent harness breakdown, a 17-plugin Claude workflow stack, and the open-source TEN Framework for interruptible real-time voice agents. On the model side a Big Technology summit centers on the federal recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models, the compute race, and a shift from token optimization to outcome optimization. Among techniques, optimal transport is breaking out while posterior collapse, parameterization, initialization, and model merging enter as new.

cited_items.title: Use These 17 Claude Plugins, It Will Make You 10x Better.
Big Technology AI Summit (full): Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie & Friends of The Podcast
